conversation:
[00:00] ICU Nurse (DEM_19605): Urgent clinical support needed. We need 3 units of ventilator (21.0 kg) from Medical Supply Center MED_68. A critical patient needs a backup ventilator before the next procedure. Delivery is needed within 30 minutes. The request comes from the icu nurse. Special handling is required: shock_protection. It is an overnight request, so the on-site team is working with a reduced backup stock. The receiving point is a clinic. The receiver serves a vulnerable population.
[00:00] Medical Logistics: Confirmed. Secure the unit with reinforced brackets before takeoff. Medical Supply Center MED_68 is preparing the payload now. ETA 30 min. The nurse station will receive it at the clinical loading zone.
[00:00] ICU Nurse: Understood. The care team will use it immediately on arrival. The care team will take over the item as soon as it lands.

[21:03] Dispatcher: Understood. We'll ensure it’s dropped off at a locker. Expect a notification soon!
